scores.correctness_notes: Mostly correct but has minor inaccuracies: priority order description omits 'error' at the top (highest priority), and doesn't mention that calling add_status with ErrorStatus or UnknownStatus is an error. Also doesn't mention collect_app_status example or that it fires only on leader.
scores.hallucination_notes: Priority order stated as 'BlockedStatus > WaitingStatus > MaintenanceStatus > ActiveStatus' which omits ErrorStatus at the top. The gold standard notes error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active. Minor omission rather than outright fabrication, but slightly inaccurate.
